event.description:
http://photos3.meetupstatic.com/photos/event/4/2/3/8/600_340636952.jpeg

Startups [Shark-Tank] Showcase Demo+Pitch, we have a celebrity guest Judge from Myth-Busters on Judges panel, quess who? Jamie Hyneman, Adam Savage, Tory Belleci, Kari Byron, Grant Imahara (http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Grant_Imahara) and we are searching for the next "great startup!" Therefore:

1) Please RSVP at Startups Showcase, meetup page at: http://tiny.cc/Startups-Showcase!

2) Get your tickets now before the price goes up!
http://tiny.cc/StartupsShowcaseTicket

Our Demo + Pitch event is for all Business Verticals!
*SOFTWARE + Hardware + All Apps (iOS, Driod, Native & Web) + Any Product/Service.

ENTREPRENEURS
Temple SF, a premier night club / Event Venue is hosting Startups Showcase [Shark Tank] we are super excited to have our event at Temple SF.

http://photos4.meetupstatic.com/photos/event/5/1/5/6/600_312980822.jpeg

This Startup Demo+Pitch will be Judged by Industry Pro's, VC's and Angels! Therefore bring your "A" Game!

AGENDA

5:00 PM - Demo setup
6:00 PM - Networking Mixer
7:00 PM - Speaker (Sponsor Opportunty)
7:15 PM - 2 Min - Pitching begins
8:45 PM - Voting for the Winner
8:50 PM - Winner Announced
9:00 - 10:00 PM More Networking
9:10 - After - Party only RSVP's allowed entry.

LIST of DEMO CO's

List - Coming Soon...

LIST of INVESTORS

Micro Ventures | SFAngel Group | Voivoda Ventures | Paladin Capital Group | DoubleRock Venture Capital | Keiretsu Forum | Giovanni Tripodi, Angel |Anna Dvornikova, Angel - TEC Venture | Manu Das, Angel | Peter Bloom, Angel | Guillermo Bodnar | Preethi Kasireddy, Partner Andreessen Horowitz | Don Hemingway AngelSearch |

We are searching for the next "Startup" investment!
event.title: Startups [Shark-Tank] Showcase Demo+Pitch Expo & Mixer.
